title: Bala (disambiguation)
content:
'''Bala''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Bala Waleen]]''', a lover of [[Lourna Dee]]
*'''[[Bala-bala]]s''', [[speeder]]s used on [[Akiva]]
*'''[[Bala-Tik]]''', a member of the [[Guavian Death Gang]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Bala]]''', the innermost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Aramand system/Legends|Aramand system]]
*The '''[[Bala D'ur]]''', a faction of the [[White Maw]]
**The '''[[Bala D'ur Hideout]]'''
*'''[[Bala Nisi]]''', a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] on the [[Dantooine Jedi Enclave Council]]
*The '''[[Bala Trix Nebula]]'''
*'''[[Mon Bala]]''', the innermost planet of the [[Ryloth system/Legends|Ryloth system]]

{{Disambig}}
